item.title: 曝苹果寻求收购 AI 芯片企业，补强 AI 服务器算力
item.guid: 曝苹果寻求收购-AI-芯片企业，补强-AI-服务器算力
item.description:
According to The Information, Apple is seeking to acquire AI chip companies to enhance its own data centers' ability to handle high-intensity AI workloads and reduce its reliance on Nvidia chips. 据《The Information》报道，苹果正在寻求收购 AI 芯片企业，以提升自有数据中心处理高强度 AI 工作负载的能力，并降低对英伟达芯片的依赖。

Currently, Apple's data centers use self-developed M2 Ultra chips to handle some AI tasks; for the demand of running larger models like Google Gemini, it relies on Nvidia chips in Google Cloud. 目前，苹果数据中心使用自研 M2 Ultra 芯片处理部分 AI 任务；对于运行 Google Gemini 等更大型模型的需求，则需要依托 Google 云中的英伟达芯片。

Sources say that Apple's next-generation AI server chip, codenamed Baltra, was originally planned for release this year, but the project has been delayed, with the specific reasons not yet disclosed. 知情人士称，苹果内部代号为 Baltra 的下一代 AI 服务器芯片原计划于今年推出，但项目已经推迟，具体原因尚未披露。

The report mentioned that Apple has recently discussed potential deals with bankers and has also contacted some semiconductor startups to understand their willingness to be acquired. 报道提到，苹果近期已与银行家讨论潜在交易，也接触过部分半导体初创企业，了解其被收购意愿。

Apple is also advancing AI server chip development through other means. In 2024, Apple was reported to be collaborating with Broadcom to develop AI server chips; Broadcom stated in a securities filing last week that the two parties would extend their long-term technology cooperation until 2031, but did not disclose the specific content of the cooperation. 苹果还在通过其他方式推进 AI 服务器芯片研发。2024 年，苹果曾被报道与博通合作开发 AI 服务器芯片；博通上周在证券文件中表示，双方将把长期技术合作延续至 2031 年，但没有披露具体合作内容。

item.title: Anthropic 被曝筹备秋季 IPO 投资者会议
item.guid: Anthropic-被曝筹备秋季-IPO-投资者会议
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Anthropic is preparing to hold meetings with investors regarding a potential initial public offering, with the earliest listing time possibly in the fall of this year. The company has contacted several investment banks, hoping to enter the public market before OpenAI and DeepSeek. 据彭博社报道，Anthropic 正准备就潜在首次公开募股与投资者展开会议，上市时间最快可能落在今年秋季。公司已与多家投行接触，希望在 OpenAI 与 DeepSeek 之前进入公开市场。

According to DigiTimes, Anthropic is seeking to expand its multi-billion dollar credit line to prepare funds for pre-IPO model training, computing power procurement, and business expansion. 另据 DigiTimes 消息，Anthropic 正寻求扩充数十亿美元授信额度，为上市前的模型训练、算力采购和业务扩张准备资金。

item.title: DeepSeek 新一轮融资后估值约 3510 亿元
item.guid: DeepSeek-新一轮融资后估值约-3510-亿元
item.description:
The investment progress announcement disclosed by listed company Kaizun Shares on July 16 revealed some data from DeepSeek's new round of financing. Based on the investment amount and shareholding ratio in the announcement, DeepSeek's valuation after this round of financing is estimated to be approximately 351 billion yuan. 上市公司开润股份 7 月 16 日披露的投资进展公告，公开了 DeepSeek 新一轮融资的部分数据。按公告中的投资金额和持股比例推算，DeepSeek 本轮融资完成后估值约为 3510 亿元。

Jiemian News quoted sources close to DeepSeek as saying that the company has started its second round of financing. Regarding whether it will rush for a listing on the STAR Market by the end of the year, the source stated that it is currently undecided. 界面新闻援引接近 DeepSeek 的人士称，公司已开始启动第二轮融资。对于年底是否冲刺科创板，该人士表示目前尚未确定。

item.title: Codex 团队回应 GPT-5.6 误删文件风险：建议谨慎使用完全访问模式
item.guid: Codex-团队回应-GPT-5.6-误删文件风险：建议谨慎使用完全访问模式
item.description:
Yesterday, Tibo, technical manager of the Codex team, posted that the team has investigated multiple reports of GPT-5.6 accidentally deleting files. Such issues are most common when users enable full access mode, do not enable sandbox protection, and do not use automatic review features. 昨天，Codex 团队技术经理 Tibo 发文称，团队已调查多起 GPT-5.6 意外删除文件的报告。相关问题最常见于用户开启完全访问模式、未启用沙箱保护，且没有使用自动审查功能的情况。

Tibo stated that the model sometimes attempts to overwrite the HOME environment variable to set up a temporary directory; if the model makes an incorrect judgment as a result, it may accidentally delete the user's HOME directory. In response, the Codex team plans to update developer messages to guide more users to use safer permission modes and add additional harness protection measures. Tibo 表示，模型有时会尝试覆盖 HOME 环境变量，以便设置临时目录；如果模型因此发生误判，就可能误删用户的 HOME 目录。对此，Codex 团队计划更新开发者消息，引导更多用户使用更安全的权限模式，并增加额外的 harness 保护措施。

He also stated that even if users run the model in full access mode without sandbox protection or automatic review, the system should not delete the user's home directory. The team will release a detailed post-mortem analysis report in the coming days, further explaining the cause of the incident and measures to mitigate risks. 他同时表示，即使用户在没有沙箱保护或自动审查的完全访问模式下运行模型，系统也不应出现删除用户主目录的行为。团队将在未来几天发布详细的事后分析报告，进一步说明事件原因以及降低风险的措施。

item.title: 真我在中国暂停产品更新
item.guid: 真我在中国暂停产品更新
item.description: Jiemian News learned from OPPO that in order to further integrate group resources and achieve synergy in global product strategy, future realme new products will focus on overseas markets, with product updates paused in the Chinese market; OnePlus's product updates in the Chinese market remain unchanged. 界面新闻从 OPPO 方面获悉，为了进一步整合集团资源，实现全球产品战略的协同，未来 realme 新品将聚焦海外市场，在中国市场暂停产品更新；一加在中国市场的产品更新保持不变。

item.title: 百度申请在香港和纳斯达克双重主要上市
item.guid: 百度申请在香港和纳斯达克双重主要上市
item.description:
On July 16, Baidu Group announced that its board of directors has authorized management to proceed with a voluntary conversion to primary listing on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, with the relevant procedures expected to be completed within this year. 7 月 16 日，百度集团发布公告称，公司董事会已授权管理层推进在香港联交所主板自愿转换为主要上市，预计相关程序将于今年内完成。

Upon completion of the conversion, Baidu will achieve dual primary listing in Hong Kong, China, and Nasdaq. Baidu stated that after the dual primary listing takes effect, it will enhance the company's securities liquidity, expand its investor base, and provide greater flexibility for accessing both capital markets. 转换完成后，百度将在中国香港和纳斯达克实现双重主要上市。百度表示，双重主要上市生效后，将提升公司证券流动性、扩大投资者基础，并为进入两个资本市场提供更大灵活性。

Yicai Global analyzed that if the relevant procedures proceed smoothly and meet the inclusion criteria for Stock Connect, Baidu is expected to catch the September Stock Connect adjustment window this year. 《第一财经》分析称，若相关流程顺利推进，并满足港股通纳入条件，百度有望赶上今年 9 月港股通调整窗口。

item.title: 华为撤回「世界」商标申请
item.guid: 华为撤回「世界」商标申请
item.description:
The 1991st trademark announcement issued by the National Intellectual Property Administration shows that Huawei's "世界" (World) trademark application has been approved for withdrawal. 国家知识产权局发布的第 1991 期商标公告显示，华为「世界」商标申请已获准撤回。

The trademark is approved for use in Class 12, covering core automotive and vehicle-related goods such as electric vehicles, hybrid vehicles, vehicle interiors, and photographic drones. It entered the preliminary examination announcement phase on May 13, 2026, with the opposition period originally planned to last until August 13, 2026. 该商标核定使用在第 12 类，涵盖电动汽车、混合动力汽车、运载工具内饰、摄影无人机等核心汽车及运载工具相关商品，于 2026 年 5 月 13 日进入初审公告阶段，异议期原计划持续至 2026 年 8 月 13 日。

On June 23 this year, Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd. submitted a trademark withdrawal application to the National Intellectual Property Administration. Currently, the announcement only indicates that the applicant has withdrawn the trademark application, without disclosing the specific reasons for the withdrawal. 今年 6 月 23 日，华为公司向国家知识产权局提交了商标撤回申请。目前，公告内容仅表明申请人撤回了该商标申请，未披露具体撤回原因。

Previously, this trademark sparked widespread discussion during the preliminary examination and announcement phase. Some netizens questioned whether the word 'world' could be registered as a trademark by a single enterprise, while others joked that the World Cup would be forced to change its name. 此前，这枚商标在初审公告阶段曾引发广泛讨论，有网友质疑「世界」一词是否可以被单一企业注册为商标，也有网友调侃称世界杯将被迫改名。

In addition to 'World', Huawei has also applied for over 170 trademarks containing the character '界' (jie), including Tianjie (Heavenly Realm), Xianjie (Immortal Realm), Zunjie (Venerable Realm), Longjie (Dragon Realm), Xinjie (New Realm), and Jingjie (Capital Realm). 除「世界」外，华为还申请了包括天界、仙界、尊界、龙界、新界、京界等在内的 170 多个「界」字商标。

item.title: NotebookLM 更名为 Gemini Notebook，将接入 Gemini 和 Google 搜索
item.guid: NotebookLM-更名为-Gemini-Notebook，将接入-Gemini-和-Google-搜索
item.description:
According to GSMArena, Google announced yesterday that it is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. Google stated that since its launch in 2023, NotebookLM has served over 30 million people and 600,000 organizations, thus its product positioning has exceeded the scope of its original name. 据 GSMArena 报道，Google 昨日宣布将 NotebookLM 更名为 Gemini Notebook。Google 表示，NotebookLM 自 2023 年推出以来，已服务超过 3000 万人和 60 万个组织，因此产品定位已超出原有名称的范围。

After the renaming, Gemini Notebook will temporarily continue to operate as a standalone product, primarily positioned as a research tool. Concurrently, it will further integrate into the Google ecosystem, including Gemini applications and Google Search. 更名后，Gemini Notebook 暂时仍将作为独立产品运营，主要定位为研究工具。与此同时，它将进一步接入 Google 生态，包括 Gemini 应用和 Google 搜索。

Users can currently access notebooks within the Gemini app, and will later be able to use related content through Google Search's AI Mode. 用户目前已经可以在 Gemini 应用中访问笔记本，后续还将能够通过 Google 搜索的 AI Mode 使用相关内容。

Google also began rolling out an update that provides a secure cloud-based computing environment for each notebook. With this environment, Gemini Notebook can natively write and run code based on user-provided materials for complex data analysis. Google 同时开始推送一项更新，为每个笔记本提供安全的云端计算机环境。借助这一环境，Gemini Notebook 可以基于用户提供的资料原生编写并运行代码，用于复杂的数据分析。

Currently, this feature is available to Google AI Ultra subscribers and Workspace customers, while all Pro users are expected to receive support via the web version in the coming weeks. 目前，该功能面向 Google AI Ultra 订阅用户和 Workspace 客户开放，所有 Pro 用户则预计将在未来几周内通过网页版获得支持。

item.title: 被曝上传完整仓库后，Grok Build 宣布开源
item.guid: 被曝上传完整仓库后，Grok-Build-宣布开源
item.description:
Yesterday, SpaceXAI announced the open-sourcing of Grok Build's CLI, terminal interface, and AI agent runtime source code, and reset all users' usage quotas. 昨日，SpaceXAI 宣布开源 Grok Build 的 CLI、终端界面和 AI 智能体运行时源码，并将所有用户的使用额度重置。

The GitHub page shows that the main code for the Grok Build project is written in Rust, and the repository currently has only 1 commit, with official contributions from external code not yet accepted. GitHub 页面显示，Grok Build 项目主体代码使用 Rust 编写，目前仓库仅有 1 次提交，官方暂不接受外部代码贡献。

Before the open-source decision was announced, Grok Build was exposed for defaulting to uploading entire Git repositories. Subsequently, SpaceXAI adjusted its data retention settings and promised to delete all previously uploaded user data. It's worth noting that what was open-sourced this time is the programming tool itself and its runtime source code, not the Grok 4.5 model. 此次开源决定发布前，Grok Build 曾被曝默认上传完整 Git 仓库。随后，SpaceXAI 调整了数据保留设置，并承诺删除此前上传的所有用户数据。值得注意的是，此次开源的是编程工具本身及其运行时源码，Grok 4.5 模型并未开源。

item.title: 黄仁勋东京面谢世嘉前社长 30 年前雪中送炭
item.guid: 黄仁勋东京面谢世嘉前社长-30-年前雪中送炭
item.description:
Recently, Sega and NVIDIA jointly held a 30th-anniversary collaboration event, publicly disclosing historical details that Sega had provided $5 million in critical financial aid to a struggling NVIDIA in its early days. 日前，世嘉与英伟达联合举办合作 30 周年纪念活动，并公开披露了世嘉早期曾向面临困境的英伟达提供 500 万美元关键资金援助的历史细节。

Sega officially posted on X that this commemorative event revolved around the two companies' 30-year collaboration in the fields of gaming and graphics technology. 世嘉官方在 X 上发文，本次纪念活动围绕两家公司在游戏与图形技术领域的 30 年合作历程展开。

The core highlight of the event was the first public unveiling of gameplay footage for the new title 'Unreal Fighter: Clash of Fates'. Officials confirmed that the demo content was running live on a laptop equipped with 'NVIDIA RTX Spark'. 活动现场的核心环节为新作《虚幻斗士 命运交锋》游戏画面的首次公开。官方证实，该演示内容系在搭载「NVIDIA RTX Spark」的笔记本电脑上进行实机运行。

NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, Sega CEO Haruki Satomi, COO Shuji Utsumi, former Sega President Shoichiro Irimajiri, and 'Unreal Fighter' series founder Yu Suzuki, along with other core executives and iconic industry figures, all took the stage to attend. 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋、世嘉 CEO 里见治纪、COO 内海州史，以及前世嘉社长入交昭一郎、《虚幻斗士》系列创始人铃木裕等核心高管与行业标志性人物悉数登台出席。

Approximately 30 years ago, the two companies collaborated to develop new 3D graphics technology. Although the project was eventually halted, then-Sega President Shoichiro Irimajiri, recognizing Jensen Huang's business vision and NVIDIA's technological reserves, decided to provide approximately $5 million (then equivalent to about 500 million Japanese Yen) in financial assistance to NVIDIA, which was facing financial difficulties at the time. 约 30 年前，两家公司曾合作开发全新 3D 图形技术，尽管该项目最终被中止，但时任世嘉社长入交昭一郎因认可黄仁勋的商业远见与英伟达的技术储备，拍板向当时处于财务困境的英伟达提供约 500 万美元（时值约 5 亿日元）的资金援助。

item.title: 华为预计 L3 于 2027 年规模商用，城区 L4 分阶段试点
item.guid: 华为预计-L3-于-2027-年规模商用，城区-L4-分阶段试点
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, Jin Yuzhi, Huawei's Senior Vice President and CEO of Qianwang, announced the commercialization roadmap for autonomous driving yesterday: this year, plans include piloting urban low-speed L4 in some cities; by 2027, promoting large-scale commercialization of L3, and piloting Robotaxi and commercial low-speed L4 in some cities. 据财联社报道，华为高级副总裁、引望 CEO 靳玉志昨日公布自动驾驶商用时间表：今年计划在部分城市开展城区低速 L4 试点；2027 年推动 L3 规模商用，并在部分城市试点 Robotaxi、商用低速 L4。

According to this timetable, 2028 will see attempts to expand urban commercial use of Robotaxi, promote large-scale commercialization of urban low-speed L4, and simultaneously conduct pilots for urban full-speed L4 and unmanned trunk logistics. 按该时间表，2028 年将尝试扩大 Robotaxi 的城市商用，推动城区低速 L4 规模商用，同时开展城区全速 L4 和无人干线物流试点。

item.title: 智己回应多地经销商经营异常：将为购车用户兜底
item.guid: 智己回应多地经销商经营异常：将为购车用户兜底
item.description:
According to 'Next-Gen Auto Research Institute', several IM Motors dealerships in Kunming, Zhuhai, and other areas have experienced operational abnormalities, with some consumers having paid in full but unable to pick up their vehicles or receive refunds. One consumer in Kunming failed to obtain a vehicle after paying 192,700 yuan, and the local rights protection group already has over 280 people, with multiple consumers reporting similar issues. 据《次世代车研所》报道，昆明、珠海等地多家智己汽车经销商出现经营异常，部分消费者已付全款但无法提车或退款。昆明一名消费者支付 19.27 万元后未能取得车辆，当地维权群已有 280 多人，多名消费者反映遭遇相同问题。

IM Motors stated that the related financial issues involve a large sum and multiple parties, and a special team has been established, promising to address reasonable demands. Regarding the situation where vehicle certificates of conformity were mortgaged, the company said it would advance funds to redeem the certificates, and consumers do not need to participate in dealer debt processing. The police and regulatory authorities have also intervened to investigate each case. 智己汽车表示，相关资金问题金额较大、涉及多方，已成立专项团队并承诺承担合理诉求。针对车辆合格证被抵押的情况，公司称将垫付资金赎证，消费者无需参与经销商债务处理，警方和监管部门也已介入逐案核查。

The report shows that three stores in Kunming were affected, with approximately 60 employees owed three months' wages; one store in Zhuhai closed on July 14. IM Motors delivered 40,087 vehicles in the first half of this year, a year-on-year increase of 58%. 报道显示，昆明三家门店受到影响，约 60 名员工被拖欠三个月工资；珠海一家门店于 7 月 14 日关闭。智己今年上半年交付 40087 辆，同比增长 58%。

item.title: 丰田、宝马联合测试可再生汽油，二氧化碳排放有望减少 70%
item.guid: 丰田、宝马联合测试可再生汽油，二氧化碳排放有望减少-70%
item.description:
According to InsideEVs, Toyota and BMW launched a pilot project for renewable gasoline (Renewable Gas) in Spain yesterday. The project, a collaboration between Toyota, BMW, Spanish energy company Repsol, and Bosch, aims to explore emission reduction pathways beyond electrification. 据 InsideEVs 报道，丰田与 BMW 昨日起在西班牙启动了一项可再生汽油（Renewable Gas）的实测项目。该项目由丰田、BMW、西班牙能源公司 Repsol 以及博世（Bosch）合作开展，旨在探索电动化之外的减排路径。

The pilot project involves approximately 20 vehicles and will run for 6 months. The test vehicles will exclusively use Nexa 95 renewable fuel produced by Repsol, while Bosch will provide the digital fuel tracking system. Repsol stated that Nexa 95 fuel is made from renewable raw materials such as organic waste, and its CO2 emissions can be reduced by over 70% compared to traditional gasoline. 此次实测规模约为 20 辆汽车，测试周期为 6 个月。测试车辆将完全使用 Repsol 生产的 Nexa 95 可再生燃料，博世则负责提供数字燃料跟踪系统。Repsol 方面表示，Nexa 95 燃料由有机废料等可再生原料制成，相比传统汽油，其二氧化碳排放量可降低 70% 以上。

Unlike e-fuels, which require CO2 capture and synthesis with hydrogen, renewable fuels are primarily derived from organic waste. Repsol pointed out that the amount of CO2 released by this fuel is essentially equal to the amount absorbed by its raw materials during their growth cycle. 与需要捕获二氧化碳并结合氢气合成的电子燃料（e-fuels）不同，可再生燃料主要源自有机废物。Repsol 指出，这种燃料释放的二氧化碳量与其原材料在生长周期内吸收的量基本相等。

Furthermore, renewable fuels can serve as a "direct substitute" for existing internal combustion engine vehicles, requiring no extensive modifications to vehicle hardware. 此外，可再生燃料可作为现有内燃机车辆的「直接替代品」，无需对车辆硬件进行大规模改装。

item.title: 2030 年全国算力用电量预计达 8000 亿千瓦时
item.guid: 2030-年全国算力用电量预计达-8000-亿千瓦时
item.description:
On July 14, Zhang Lin, Director of the Planning and Development Department of the China Electricity Council, stated at a relevant press conference that during the "15th Five-Year Plan" period, China's computing power electricity consumption is expected to increase by over 100 billion kilowatt-hours annually, reaching 800 billion kilowatt-hours by 2030, accounting for about 6% of the total electricity consumption of society. 7 月 14 日，中国电力企业联合会规划发展部主任张琳在相关发布会上表示，预计「十五五」时期中国算力用电量年均新增 1000 亿千瓦时以上，到 2030 年将达到 8000 亿千瓦时，占全社会用电量的 6% 左右。

Data from the National Energy Administration shows that China's data center electricity consumption will be approximately 170 billion kilowatt-hours in 2025, with an average annual growth rate of about 39.5% over the past three years. 国家能源局数据显示，2025 年中国数据中心用电量约为 1700 亿千瓦时，近 3 年平均增长率约为 39.5%。

item.title: 台积电二季度净利润同比增长 77.4%
item.guid: 台积电二季度净利润同比增长-77.4%
item.description:
TSMC announced its Q2 2026 financial results on July 16: revenue was NT$1.27038 trillion, a year-on-year increase of 36%; net profit was NT$706.56 billion, a year-on-year increase of 77.4%; operating profit was NT$766.6 billion, a year-on-year increase of 65.4%, and gross margin was 67.7%. 台积电 7 月 16 日发布 2026 年第二季度业绩：营收 1.27038 万亿元新台币，同比增长 36%；净利润 7065.6 亿元新台币，同比增长 77.4%；营业利润 7666 亿元新台币，同比增长 65.4%，毛利率为 67.7%。

By process node, 2nm, 3nm, 5nm, and 7nm contributed 3%, 30%, 33%, and 11% respectively to the quarter's wafer sales. 7nm and more advanced processes combined accounted for 77% of wafer sales. 按制程划分，2nm、3nm、5nm 和 7nm 分别贡献当季晶圆销售额的 3%、30%、33% 和 11%。7nm 及更先进制程合计占晶圆销售额的 77%。

TSMC expects Q3 2026 revenue to be between US$44.6 billion and US$45.8 billion, representing a quarter-on-quarter increase of approximately 12% and a year-on-year increase of approximately 37% based on the median. Gross margin is expected to be between 65% and 67%, and operating profit margin between 56% and 58%. 台积电预计，2026 年第三季度营收将在 446 亿至 458 亿美元之间，按中位数计算环比增长约 12%，同比增长约 37%；毛利率预计为 65% 至 67%，营业利润率预计为 56% 至 58%。

At the same time, the company raised its 2026 capital expenditure guidance from the previous "over US$56 billion" to US$60 billion to US$64 billion. TSMC CEO C.C. Wei stated that the AI trend continues to drive growth in computing demand and advanced process chip demand; however, consumer electronics demand is expected to face pressure due to rising prices. 同时，公司将 2026 年资本支出指引从此前的「超过 560 亿美元」上调至 600 亿至 640 亿美元。台积电 CEO 魏哲家表示，AI 趋势仍在推动计算需求增长，并带动先进制程芯片需求；但受价格上涨影响，消费电子需求预计将承压。

item.title: 💡 Figma 设计主管：AI 时代招聘门槛提高，设计师需用高保真作品证明自己
item.guid: 💡-Figma-设计主管：AI-时代招聘门槛提高，设计师需用高保真作品证明自己
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Noah Levin, Vice President of Product Design at Figma, stated in an interview yesterday that the widespread adoption of AI tools has significantly raised the company's assessment standards for product design applicants. 据《商业内幕》报道，Figma 产品设计副总裁 Noah Levin 昨日在接受采访时表示，AI 工具的普及已显著提升了公司对产品设计岗位应聘者的考核标准。

Levin pointed out that because AI can help designers create high-quality and interactive prototypes in a very short time, Figma now requires candidates to demonstrate the ability to use the latest AI tools to present "highest fidelity" design solutions. Levin 指出，由于 AI 能够助力设计师在极短时间内创作出高质量且具交互性的原型，Figma 现在要求候选人必须具备利用最新 AI 工具展示「最高保真度」设计方案的能力。

Levin recalled that ten years ago, due to technical barriers, it was difficult for designers to produce prototypes consistent with the real product experience. Today, AI features in Vibe Coding platforms like Lovable, Base44, and Emergent, as well as traditional tools like Canva and Wix, have made the creation of high-fidelity prototypes readily accessible. Levin 回忆称，十年前受限于技术门槛，设计师很难产出与真实产品体验一致的原型。而如今，诸如 Lovable、Base44 和 Emergent 等 Vibe Coding 平台，以及 Canva 和 Wix 等传统工具的 AI 功能，已让高保真原型的制作变得触手可及。

He emphasized that applicants should not fall behind the changes in workflow, and Figma expects to see candidates actively experimenting with new tools. 他强调，应聘者不应落后于工作流的变革，Figma 期待看到候选人对新工具的积极尝试。

However, Levin explicitly stated that this does not mean the company accepts "AI slop." He believes that the core responsibilities of designers—solving user problems and refining craftsmanship—have not changed. Compared to a perfect final draft, he values candidates demonstrating discarded failed prototypes more. 不过，Levin 明确表示，这并不意味着公司接受「AI 垃圾」（AI slop）式的堆砌。他认为设计师的核心职责——解决用户问题与打磨工艺——并未改变。相比于完美的最终稿，他更看重候选人展示那些被舍弃的失败原型。

item.title: 努比亚全球首款 AI 智能体手机 NaviX Ultra 亮相，搭载豆包手机助手
item.guid: 努比亚全球首款-AI-智能体手机-NaviX-Ultra-亮相，搭载豆包手机助手
item.description:
Nubia announced yesterday that the world's first AI agent smartphone, NaviX Ultra, has officially debuted. Equipped with the Doubao Mobile Assistant, Nubia claims it will usher in a new era for AI agent smartphones. 努比亚昨日宣布，全球首款 AI 智能体手机 NaviX Ultra 正式亮相。该机搭载豆包手机助手，努比亚称其将开启 AI 智能体手机的新阶段。

The NaviX Ultra will be available in colors such as black, pink, silver, and purple. The device features an orange "AI button" and a horizontally arranged rear camera module. NaviX Ultra 将提供黑色、粉色、银色和紫色等配色，机身配备橙色「AI 键」，后置摄像头模组采用横向布局。

Ni Fei, President of Nubia Technology Co., Ltd., previously revealed that Nubia has taken the lead in completing the filing for its large AI agent model; Ni Fei also stated that the NaviX Ultra will be the first terminal product to feature such a large model. 努比亚技术有限公司总裁倪飞此前透露，努比亚已率先完成智能体大模型备案；倪飞还表示，NaviX Ultra 将成为首款搭载该类大模型的终端产品。

Ni Fei stated that the Doubao Mobile Assistant on the NaviX Ultra will support users in delegating some tasks to the AI agent for processing. 倪飞表示，NaviX Ultra 搭载的豆包手机助手将支持用户把部分任务交给 AI 智能体处理。

item.title: 荣耀 Robot Phone 展示双配色与四自由度云台
item.guid: 荣耀-Robot-Phone-展示双配色与四自由度云台
item.description:
Honor CEO Li Jian unveiled two color options for the Robot Phone and announced that the product is ready. The device was previously available for offline pre-orders and is scheduled for launch in the third quarter of this year. 荣耀 CEO 李健公布 Robot Phone 双配色，并表示产品已准备就绪。该机此前已开放线下预约，计划今年第三季度上市。

The Robot Phone integrates a four-degree-of-freedom titanium alloy mechanical gimbal on its top, which can pop up in about 0.8 seconds, supporting 360° tracking and 90°, 180° camera movements. The imaging system includes a 200-megapixel gimbal main camera, a 50-megapixel ultra-wide-angle lens, and a 200-megapixel periscope telephoto lens, and introduces ARRI Log-C encoding and LUT. Robot Phone 的机身顶部集成四自由度钛合金机械云台，可在约 0.8 秒内弹出，支持 360° 追踪和 90°、180° 运镜。影像系统包括 2 亿像素云台主摄、5000 万像素超广角和 2 亿像素潜望长焦，并引入 ARRI Log-C 编码与 LUT。

The device is equipped with the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition, a 1.5K flat screen, and an on-device YOYO model. It has passed 3C certification, and its adapter supports up to 120W fast charging. 该机搭载第五代骁龙 8 至尊版、1.5K 直屏和端侧 YOYO 模型，已通过 3C 认证，适配器最高支持 120W 快充。

item.title: 24.98 万元，新一代理想 L6 上市
item.guid: 24.98-万元，新一代理想-L6-上市
item.description:
The new generation Li Auto L6 has been officially launched, offering only the Ultra version, priced at 249,800 yuan. The new car is equipped with a 51 kWh range-extended dedicated battery, providing a CLTC pure electric range of 300 km and a comprehensive range of 1250 km. It supports charging from 20% to 80% in 12 minutes and comes standard with dual-motor all-wheel drive. 新一代理想 L6 正式上市，仅提供 Ultra 一个版本，售价 24.98 万元。新车搭载 51 kWh 增程专用电池，CLTC 纯电续航 300 km，综合续航 1250 km，支持 12 分钟从 20% 充至 80%，并标配双电机四驱。

  • Dual-valve continuously variable damping shock absorbers, all-aluminum suspension; 双阀连续可变阻尼减振器、全铝悬架；
  • 29-inch 6K panoramic screen, Qualcomm Snapdragon 8797 cockpit chip; 29 英寸 6K 全景屏、高通骁龙 8797 座舱芯片；
  • Mach M100 assisted driving chip, with 1280 TOPS computing power; 马赫 M100 辅助驾驶芯片，算力 1280 TOPS；
  • ADB adaptive high beams, full-car soft-close doors; ADB 自适应远光灯、全车电吸门；
  • Rear seatbacks adjustable up to 140°, and equipped with active noise cancellation. 后排靠背最大可调至 140°，并配备主动降噪。

Li Auto states that the new car's body roll has been reduced by 30% compared to the previous generation. Assisted driving features will be pushed out starting from the end of July, and the embodied intelligent Mach package is optional, priced at 20,000 yuan. The initial sales period ends at 24:00 on August 31st, with special paint, Obsidian Black sport package, and front dual full-size zero-gravity seat package provided free of charge. 理想称，新车侧倾幅度较上一代降低 30%。辅助驾驶相关功能将从 7 月底开始推送，具身智能马赫套装可选装，价格为 2 万元。首销期截至 8 月 31 日 24 时，特殊车漆、曜黑运动套件和前排双全尺寸零重力座椅套装免费提供。

🔗 Related reading: 249,800 yuan, the new generation Li Auto L6 launched: 51kWh large battery, flagship chip down-ported, starting to make up for handling shortcomings 🔗 相关阅读： 24.98 万元，新一代理想 L6 上市：51kWh 大电池、旗舰芯片下放，开始补操控这一课

item.title: Kimi K3 正式发布，2.8 万亿参数，支持 100 万 token 上下文
item.guid: Kimi-K3-正式发布，2.8-万亿参数，支持-100-万-token-上下文
item.description:
Kimi K3 has been officially released, featuring 2.8 trillion parameters, native support for visual understanding, and a 1 million token context window. The official statement calls it the world's first open-source model at the 3 trillion level, primarily targeting scenarios such as long-range programming, knowledge work, and reasoning. Kimi K3 正式发布，采用 2.8 万亿参数规模，原生支持视觉理解，并提供 100 万 token 上下文窗口。官方将其称为全球首个 3 万亿级别开源模型，主要面向长程编程、知识工作和推理等场景。

Kimi K3 adopts an MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture, activating 16 experts out of 896. The official statement claims that, combined with technologies such as Stable LatentMoE, Quantile Balancing, and Per-Head Muon, Kimi K3's overall scaling efficiency is approximately 2.5 times higher than Kimi K2. Kimi K3 采用 MoE 架构，在 896 个专家中激活 16 个专家。官方称，结合 Stable LatentMoE、Quantile Balancing、Per-Head Muon 等技术后，Kimi K3 相比 Kimi K2 的整体扩展效率提升约 2.5 倍。

In terms of performance, official benchmark data shows that Kimi K3 ranks among the top in multiple programming and agent tasks. In the DeepSWE test, Kimi K3 scored 67.5, ranking third; in FrontierSWE and the internal Kimi Code Bench 2.0, it achieved 81.2 points and 72.9 points respectively. 性能方面，官方公布的评测数据显示，Kimi K3 在多项编程和智能体任务中位居前列。在 DeepSWE 测试中，Kimi K3 得分 67.5，排名第三；在 FrontierSWE 和内部 Kimi Code Bench 2.0 中分别获得 81.2 分和 72.9 分。

Kimi K3 also scored 88.3 points in Terminal Bench 2.1, 77.8 points in Program Bench, and 42.0 points in SWE Marathon, ranking first in the latter two. Kimi K3 还在 Terminal Bench 2.1、Program Bench 和 SWE Marathon 中分别取得 88.3 分、77.8 分和 42.0 分，其中后两项排名第一。

Regarding pricing, the official API price is 2 yuan per million tokens for input (cache hit) or 20 yuan (cache miss), and 100 yuan for output. 价格方面，官方 API 价格为每百万 token 输入 2 元（命中缓存）或 20 元（未命中缓存），输出 100 元。

item.title: MiniMax 携 M3、H3 等全模态模型及产品亮相 WAIC 2026
item.guid: MiniMax-携-M3、H3-等全模态模型及产品亮相-WAIC-2026
item.description:
MiniMax showcased its flagship model M3 at WAIC 2026 and previewed the new generation multimodal generative model H3. H3 is designed for contexts composed of text, images, video, and sound, no longer separating capabilities like generation, editing, and referencing into independent tasks. MiniMax 在 WAIC 2026 展示旗舰模型 M3，并预热新一代多模态生成模型 H3。H3 面向文本、图像、视频和声音共同构成的上下文，不再把生成、编辑和参考等能力拆成彼此独立的任务。

M3 has a total of 428 billion parameters, with 23 billion active parameters, supporting up to 1 million tokens of context, and employs the MiniMax Sparse Attention architecture. The model is designed for long context, programming, and agent tasks, and has been adapted for computing platforms such as Huawei Ascend, Moore Threads, Muxi, Kunlunxin, Hygon, NVIDIA, and AMD. M3 总参数量为 4280 亿、激活参数量为 230 亿，最高支持 100 万 token 上下文，采用 MiniMax Sparse Attention 稀疏注意力架构。模型面向长上下文、编程和智能体任务，并已适配华为昇腾、摩尔线程、沐曦、昆仑芯、海光、NVIDIA 与 AMD 等计算平台。

On-site products also include MiniMax Hub, a local creation workbench that integrates video, voice, and music models. It organizes scripts, storyboards, videos, music, and editing on the same canvas, with an Agent scheduling models and tools; the voice model supports restoring timbre, breath, and speaking speed using 10 seconds of original audio, and provides output in over 40 languages. 现场产品还包括整合视频、语音和音乐模型的本地创作工作台 MiniMax Hub。它把脚本、分镜、视频、音乐和剪辑组织在同一画布中，由 Agent 调度模型与工具；语音模型支持用 10 秒原声还原音色、气息和语速，并提供 40 多种语言输出。

MiniMax also showcased cooperation cases such as robot dogs, AI glasses, smart headphones, NAS, and financial services. Among them, the Vbot robot dog is integrated with M3, with cumulative orders of 6540 units during the initial pre-sale period; Rokid AI glasses use MiniMax's voice capabilities to provide multilingual interaction and real-time translation. MiniMax 同时展示机器狗、AI 眼镜、智能耳机、NAS 与金融服务等合作案例。其中 Vbot 机器狗接入 M3，首销预售期累计订单 6540 台；Rokid AI 眼镜使用 MiniMax 语音能力提供多语言交互和实时翻译。

item.title: 阿里千问首款 AI 智能体耳机将亮相 WAIC
item.guid: 阿里千问首款-AI-智能体耳机将亮相-WAIC
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, Alibaba's personal AI assistant 'Qianwen' will officially unveil its first AI agent headphones during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). Previously, Qianwen had announced plans to launch multiple AI hardware products in different forms within the year, and AI headphones are a crucial part of its software-hardware integration strategy. 据财联社报道，阿里巴巴旗下个人 AI 助手「千问」首款 AI 智能体耳机将于 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）期间正式亮相。此前，千问曾宣布计划在年内推出多款不同形态的 AI 硬件产品，AI 耳机正是其软硬一体化战略的重要组成部分。

Sources close to Qwen's AI hardware business revealed that more detailed information about the product will be officially released during WAIC. Prior to this, Qwen had already showcased AI glasses at the Mobile World Congress (MWC) in March this year and plans to successively launch wearable devices such as AI rings within the year, aiming to build an AI assistant ecosystem across various terminals. 接近千问 AI 硬件业务的人士透露，更多关于该产品的详细信息将在 WAIC 期间正式发布。在此之前，千问已于今年 3 月的世界移动通信大会（MWC）上展示了 AI 眼镜，并计划在年内陆续推出 AI 指环等穿戴设备，旨在打造跨多种终端的 AI 助手生态。

item.title: 小米发布具身基座模型 Xiaomi-Robotics-1，10 万小时真实操作数据预训练
item.guid: 小米发布具身基座模型-Xiaomi-Robotics-1，10-万小时真实操作数据预训练
item.description:
Xiaomi yesterday released its embodied foundation model, Xiaomi-Robotics-1. The model was pre-trained with 100,000 hours of real-world operational trajectories, with data covering 1,700 scenarios across homes, offices, commercial spaces, industrial settings, and outdoors, comprising 2.4 million trajectories and over 260 types of tasks. 小米昨日发布具身基座模型 Xiaomi-Robotics-1。模型以 10 万小时真实世界操作轨迹进行预训练，数据覆盖家庭、办公室、商业、工业和户外等 1700 个场景、240 万段轨迹与 260 多类任务。

The team used a visual-language model to automatically label gripper and object state changes, processing the full pre-training data within approximately two weeks. In the post-training phase, about 10,000 hours of cross-body data were added, including over 7,200 hours of mobile manipulation robot and dual-arm robot data, over 1,000 hours of manually labeled UMI data, as well as public datasets like Bridge V2, RT-1, and DROID. 团队用视觉语言模型自动标注夹爪与物体状态变化，并在约两周内处理全量预训练数据。后训练阶段又加入约 1 万小时跨本体数据，其中包括 7200 多小时移动操作机器人与双臂机器人数据、1000 多小时人工标注 UMI 数据，以及 Bridge V2、RT-1、DROID 等公开数据集。

The model adopts a "pre-training + post-training" approach, first learning general action generation, then aligning the robot's body with natural language instructions. Official data shows that Xiaomi-Robotics-1 achieved an average success rate of 57.4% on RoboCasa365, 59.1% on VLABench, and reached 74.5% on the RoboCasa benchmark. 模型采用「预训练 + 后训练」路线，先学习通用动作生成，再完成机器人本体与自然语言指令对齐。官方数据显示，Xiaomi-Robotics-1 在 RoboCasa365 的平均成功率为 57.4%，在 VLABench 的平均成功率为 59.1%，在 RoboCasa 基准达到 74.5%。

item.title: 百灵大模型发布 Ring-2.5-1T-Zero，探索万亿参数模型纯强化学习
item.guid: 百灵大模型发布-Ring-2.5-1T-Zero，探索万亿参数模型纯强化学习
item.description:
The Bailing large model team released Ring-2.5-1T-Zero, exploring the extension of verifiable reward reinforcement learning to 1 trillion parameters without using manually labeled inference data. The team broke down high-quality thought chains into three dimensions: interpretability, reproducibility, and efficiency, no longer focusing solely on the accuracy of the final answer. 百灵大模型团队发布 Ring-2.5-1T-Zero，探索在不使用人工标注推理数据的情况下，把可验证奖励强化学习扩展到 1 万亿参数。团队把高质量思维链拆为可理解性、可复现性和效率三个维度，不再只看最终答案正确率。

The Bailing large model team released Ring-2.5-1T-Zero, exploring the extension of verifiable reward reinforcement learning to a 1 trillion parameter model without using manually labeled inference data. 百灵大模型团队发布 Ring-2.5-1T-Zero，探索在不使用人工标注推理数据的情况下，将可验证奖励强化学习扩展到 1 万亿参数模型。

Results show that after the first phase of reinforcement learning, Ring-2.5-1T-Zero achieved an AIME 2026 accuracy of 84.2%; for jointly answered AIME questions, an average of 6368 tokens were consumed. The team also noted that the effectiveness of Zero RL is still limited by factors such as pre-training knowledge, training data difficulty, and context window. 结果显示，Ring-2.5-1T-Zero 在第一阶段强化学习结束后，AIME 2026 准确率达到 84.2%；在共同答对的 AIME 题目中，平均消耗 6368 个 Token。团队同时指出，Zero RL 的效果仍受预训练知识、训练数据难度和上下文窗口等因素限制。

item.title: 苹果 2026 年返校季优惠上线，不再免费赠送 AirPods
item.guid: 苹果-2026-年返校季优惠上线，不再免费赠送-AirPods
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple officially launched its 2026 Back to School campaign, which will run until August 27th, covering 8 markets including mainland China, India, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan, Thailand, and Vietnam. 昨天，苹果正式启动 2026 年返校季活动，活动将持续至 8 月 27 日，覆盖中国内地、印度、马来西亚、菲律宾、新加坡、中国台湾、泰国和越南等 8 个市场。

This year, Apple has adjusted its previous gift mechanism to an "849 yuan promotional discount credit." After purchasing an eligible MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, iPad Air, or iPad Pro, consumers can choose to buy a four-pack of AirTags for 0 yuan, or use the discount credit to purchase AirPods or Apple Pencil Pro, but will need to pay the difference. 今年苹果将往年的赠品机制调整为「849 元促销优惠额度」。消费者购买符合条件的 MacBook Air、MacBook Pro、iPad Air 或 iPad Pro 后，可选择以 0 元购买 AirTag 四件装，也可以将优惠额度用于购买 AirPods 或 Apple Pencil Pro，但需要补足差价。

Specifically, AirPods 4 require an additional 150 yuan, the noise-cancelling version requires 550 yuan, AirPods Pro 3 requires 1050 yuan, and Apple Pencil Pro requires 50 yuan. 其中，AirPods 4 需补 150 元，降噪版需补 550 元，AirPods Pro 3 需补 1050 元，Apple Pencil Pro 需补 50 元。

This Apple event does not include MacBook Neo, iPad mini, entry-level iPad, or desktop Mac products. In terms of pricing, MacBook Air starts from 9249 yuan after educational discount, MacBook Pro from 15199 yuan, iPad Air from 5599 yuan, and iPad Pro from 9899 yuan. 苹果此次活动不包含 MacBook Neo、iPad mini、入门级 iPad 以及桌面级 Mac 产品。价格方面，MacBook Air 教育优惠后 9249 元起，MacBook Pro 15199 元起，iPad Air 5599 元起，iPad Pro 9899 元起。

Compared to previous years' events where AirPods could be obtained for free, consumers choosing AirPods this year need to pay an additional fee, leading some netizens to believe that the Back to School discount has "shrunk". 相比往年可免费获得 AirPods 的活动安排，今年消费者选择 AirPods 需要额外支付费用，因此有网友认为返校季优惠「缩水」。

item.title: 泡泡玛特创始人王宁到访苹果总部，与库克、特努斯会面
item.guid: 泡泡玛特创始人王宁到访苹果总部，与库克、特努斯会面
item.description:
On July 16, Apple CEO Tim Cook posted on social media, welcoming the Pop Mart team to Apple Park and sharing photos of his discussions with Apple's CEO-designate John Ternus and Pop Mart founder Wang Ning. 7 月 16 日，苹果 CEO 蒂姆·库克在社交平台发文，欢迎泡泡玛特团队到访 Apple Park，并晒出与苹果候任 CEO 约翰·特努斯、泡泡玛特创始人王宁交流的照片。

Both sides exchanged views on creative design, digital ecosystems, and global consumer trends. Wang Ning also presented Cook and other Apple executives with THE MONSTERS x FIFA co-branded vinyl plush figures. 双方围绕创意设计、数字生态与全球消费趋势展开交流，王宁还向库克等苹果高管赠送了 THE MONSTERS 与 FIFA 联名的搪胶毛绒公仔。

Affected by the news, Pop Mart's Hong Kong stock price rose by over 6% in the afternoon, reaching a high of HK$170.90, and finally closed at HK$168.10, an increase of HK$10.80 from the previous trading day, a gain of 6.87%. 受相关消息影响，泡泡玛特港股午后股价一度上涨超过 6%，最高触及 170.90 港元，最终收于 168.10 港元，较前一交易日上涨 10.80 港元，涨幅为 6.87%。

item.title: 共享单车集体涨价，美团青桔哈啰起步价迈入 2 元时代
item.guid: 共享单车集体涨价，美团青桔哈啰起步价迈入-2-元时代
item.description:
According to Yicai, Meituan Bike, Didi Qingju, and Hello Bike recently adjusted their billing rules in Beijing and several other cities. The three major shared bike platforms collectively adopted a combined strategy of "raising the starting price and extending the basic riding duration" for this price adjustment. 据第一财经报道，美团单车、滴滴青桔、哈啰单车于近期在北京市等多个城市上调计费规则。三大共享单车平台此次集体调价普遍采取了「提高起步定价、拉长基础骑行时长」的组合策略。

Specific rules show that Meituan Bike's starting price in the urban six districts for weekdays and weekends has been adjusted to 1.88 yuan, an increase of 0.38 yuan from before, and the initial riding duration has been extended from 30 minutes to 60 minutes; other areas maintain a starting price of 1.5 yuan / 30 minutes. Additionally, Meituan's holiday prices across all regions uniformly implement the 1.88 yuan / 60 minutes standard. 具体规则显示，美团单车在城六区的工作日及周末起步价调整为 1.88 元，较此前上涨 0.38 元，起步骑行时长由 30 分钟延长至 60 分钟；其他区域维持 1.5 元 / 30 分钟的起步价。此外，美团全区域节假日价格统一执行 1 88 元 / 60 分钟标准。

Didi Qingju and Hello Bike's billing standards have also been adjusted simultaneously. Didi Qingju's starting price for weekdays and weekends has been raised to 1.99 yuan, and the initial duration expanded from 30 minutes to 60 minutes. Hello Bike's weekday pricing standard is on par with Qingju, with a starting price of 1.99 yuan and a 60-minute ride. 滴滴青桔与哈啰单车的计费标准也进行了同步调整。滴滴青桔工作日及周末起步价上调至 1.99 元，起步时长由 30 分钟扩容至 60 分钟。哈啰单车的工作日资费标准与青桔持平，起步价同为 1.99 元并可骑行 60 分钟。

In response to this price change, all three platforms have simultaneously launched various riding membership products, including time-limited unlimited ride cards, fixed-quantity ride cards, and monthly unlimited ride cards. The platforms stated that after users activate a membership, the cost per ride can return to pre-increase levels, with some packages even offering better value for money. 针对此次价格变动，三家平台均同步推出了多种骑行会员产品，包括限时不限次卡、定量骑行次卡及月度畅骑卡等。平台方表示，用户开通会员后，单次骑行成本可回落至涨价前水平，部分套餐甚至更具性价比。

item.title: 诺兰新作《奥德赛》影评解禁，烂番茄新鲜度 98% 开分
item.guid: 诺兰新作《奥德赛》影评解禁，烂番茄新鲜度-98%-开分
item.description:
The mythological epic film "The Odyssey," directed by Christopher Nolan, officially lifted its review embargo yesterday. The film, featuring an all-star cast, currently holds a 98% fresh rating on Rotten Tomatoes (134 reviews) and an MTC score of 88 (52 reviews). 由克里斯托弗·诺兰执导的神话史诗电影《《奥德赛》》于昨日正式解禁影评。该片汇聚全明星阵容，目前在烂番茄网站获得 98% 的新鲜度（134 评），MTC 评分则达到 88 分（52 评）。

Film critics generally believe that the film is another masterpiece by Nolan after 'Oppenheimer'. Among them, Empire magazine called it an extraordinary new interpretation of ancient literature and advised audiences to watch it on the biggest screen. 影评普遍认为，该片是诺兰在《奥本海默》之后的又一巅峰力作。其中，《帝国》杂志称其为对古老文献价值非凡的全新转译，并建议观众在最大的银幕上观看。

The Playlist pointed out that the film deeply explores the definition of 'home' and the dark side of human nature. Polygon believes that Nolan, in 'Odyssey', put away his previously trusted tools and forged film history with a 'bare-handed' approach. The Playlist 指出，影片深刻探讨了「家」的定义与人性的黑暗面。Polygon 则认为，诺兰在《奥德赛》中收起了以往信赖的工具，以「赤手空拳」的姿态铸就了电影历史。

'Odyssey' is nearly 3 hours long and was shot on IMAX 70mm film. The film will be released today in North America, with a release date set for August 14 in mainland China. 《奥德赛》全长近 3 个小时，采用 IMAX 70 毫米胶片拍摄。该片将于今日在北美上映，中国内地定档 8 月 14 日。

item.title: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》7 月 24 日起小规模上映，或为冲刺奥斯卡
item.guid: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》7-月-24-日起小规模上映，或为冲刺奥斯卡
item.description:
According to Variety, the animated film 'Avatar: The Last Airbender - Aang's Legend: The Last Airbender' will have a limited release in two theaters in Los Angeles and New York from July 24 to 30. 据《Variety》报道，《降世神通：最后的气宗》动画电影《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》将于 7 月 24 日至 30 日在洛杉矶和纽约的两家影院小规模上映。

This screening is primarily to qualify for Oscar nominations, and the studio, Paramount, may use this to submit the film for Best Animated Feature and other awards. 此次放映主要是为了获得奥斯卡报名资格，片方派拉蒙可能据此为影片报名奥斯卡最佳动画长片及其他奖项。

The film had previously been adjusted from theatrical release to streaming. Paramount recently confirmed that the film will still launch on Paramount+ on July 25. In April this year, the film suffered a full-length premature leak, with related content posted online, triggering a criminal investigation. Some fans subsequently called for the film to be re-released theatrically. 影片此前已从院线发行调整为流媒体上线。派拉蒙近日确认，该片仍将于 7 月 25 日登陆 Paramount+。今年 4 月，影片曾遭遇全片提前泄露事件，相关内容被发布至网上，并引发刑事调查。部分粉丝随后呼吁影片重新进行院线发行。
